_comment: merge the 'hooks' block into <repo>/.claude/settings.json - JSON has no comments, so delete this _comment key after merging. Copy post_edit_verify.py and stop_smoke_gate.py to <repo>/.claude/hooks/ first and adapt their CONFIG blocks. 'py -3' is the Windows launcher; swap for an absolute interpreter (e.g. C:/Users/me/anaconda3/envs/app311/python.exe) if py is not on PATH. Hook 'timeout' (seconds) must exceed the subprocess TIMEOUT_S inside each script (60s verify, 90s smoke). The PostToolUse matcher MUST include Bash - editor-only matchers miss shell writes.
